message:
fix(clipboard): improve clipboard polyfill and simplify copy handling

- Grant clipboard permissions via Browser.grantPermissions for API access
- Use bubbling phase for copy/cut events to run after Monaco sets data
- Add readBrowserClipboard function for reading browser clipboard
- Store original readText to bypass polyfill when needed
- Sync clipboard data to top frame for cross-frame access
- Increase polyfill buffer sizes to prevent OutOfMemory
- Simplify copy/cut handlers - pass through to browser directly
- Note: Copy from Monaco to host doesn't work due to iframe isolation
